Class AlgoAlarmIndicatorEvaluationTask

java.lang.Object
grafioschtrader.task.exec.AlgoAlarmIndicatorEvaluationTask
All Implemented Interfaces:
ITask
@Component public class AlgoAlarmIndicatorEvaluationTask extends Object implements ITask
Scheduled task for Tier 2 alarm evaluation: indicator-based alerts (MA crossing, RSI threshold, EvalEx expression). Triggers on cron schedule configured via gt.algo.alarm.indicator.evaluation property. Before evaluation, securities with stale prices (>4 hours old) are refreshed.
